name: mr
title: Memora Recall
description: Local merge requests & code review — create MRs, review diffs, merge branches, all tracked in SQLite.
prompt:
## mr — Local Merge Requests & Code Review

Base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8767/api

Create merge requests, review code, and merge branches locally.
All responses are plain text.

### Repository management

Register repos by name first, then use the name in all MR operations.

```
POST /api/repo/register           Register a git repo
     {name, path}                 e.g. {"name": "myproject", "path": "/home/user/myproject"}
GET  /api/repo/list               List registered repos
DELETE /api/repo/<name>           Remove a repo
```

### Merge request endpoints

```
GET  /api/health                              Health check
POST /api/mr/create                           Create merge request
     {repo, source_branch, target_branch, title, description, author}
     repo = registered repo name (or absolute path for one-off use)
GET  /api/mr/list?status=open&repo=<name>     List merge requests
GET  /api/mr/<id>                             MR details + review summary
GET  /api/mr/<id>/diff                        Full git diff
GET  /api/mr/<id>/files                       Changed files list
GET  /api/mr/<id>/conflicts                   Check merge conflicts
POST /api/mr/<id>/review                      Submit review
     {reviewer, verdict, body, file_comments: [{file_path, line_number, body}]}
     verdict: approve | request_changes | comment
GET  /api/mr/<id>/reviews                     All reviews with comments
POST /api/mr/<id>/merge                       Merge (requires approval)
POST /api/mr/<id>/close                       Close MR without merging
```

### Usage examples

```bash
# Register a repository
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/repo/register \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"name": "myproject", "path": "/home/user/myproject"}'

# List registered repos
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/repo/list

# Create a merge request
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/mr/create \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"repo": "myproject", "source_branch": "feature/auth", "target_branch": "main", "title": "Add authentication", "description": "Implements JWT login flow", "author": "agent-a"}'

# List open MRs for a repo
curl -s 'http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/mr/list?status=open&repo=myproject'

# View MR details
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/mr/<id>

# View diff
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/mr/<id>/diff

# Submit review with file comments
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/mr/<id>/review \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"reviewer": "agent-b", "verdict": "approve", "body": "LGTM", "file_comments": [{"file_path": "src/auth.py", "line_number": 42, "body": "Consider adding input validation"}]}'

# Merge after approval
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8767/api/mr/<id>/merge
```

### Workflow

1. Register the repository once: POST /api/repo/register
2. Create MR with repo name and branches
3. Review the diff and changed files
4. Submit review (approve / request_changes / comment)
5. Merge when approved and conflict-free
6. Self-review is not allowed
